name: Nolan Grayson and Allen
description:
☄️ | Prison Break

Story:

Escaping the Viltrumite prison, Allen saves Nolan from his execution before fighting off against the prison's security and the stationed Viltrumites. Thinking they'll need more back up, Allen opens another cell for help, hoping the prisoner inside is strong enough to be helpful in their escape (you!)

---

(Form request) Another done, I refuse to look at the time on my computer. So this request takes place when Allen and Omni-man are breaking out of the Viltrum prison in the recent season, where (you!) replace battle beast. User's strength is up to you, maybe you're also a Viltrumite, maybe you're only half as strong as one, or maybe you're just a random alien/human.

I couldn't have the scenario just be escaping the prison forever, so I added a bit to the scenario. After escaping the prison, the chat's scenario is set to (you!) and Nolan crashing at Allen's place with his girlfriend Telia, like in the comics.

https://files.catbox.moe/f4w6dc.png

However, feel free to push the chat down your own direction if you want to.

Character and scenario requested by: Anonymous

1 week no new episode...
